quote.title: Get Insurance Quote
quote.subtitle: Calculate your premium for smart contract insurance coverage on the Stellar network.
quote.step1Desc: Enter your contract address, coverage amount, and risk factors.
quote.step2Desc: Our algorithm calculates your premium based on risk assessment.
quote.step3Desc: Accept the quote and pay the premium to activate coverage.

dashboard.title: My Policies
dashboard.emptyAll: You don't have any policies yet
dashboard.emptyAllBody: Get a quote to start your first coverage on the Stellar network.
dashboard.emptyActiveBody: All your policies have expired, or you haven't purchased one yet.
dashboard.emptyExpiredBody: Your active policies will appear here once they expire.
dashboard.walletNotConnectedBody: Connect your Stellar wallet to view your policies.
dashboard.renewDisabledWindow: Renewal opens within 30 days of expiry
dashboard.indexerLagNote: Indexer may lag ~15 s behind chain finality
dashboard.chainReadNote: Data read directly from the Soroban ledger — no indexer lag
